rationale: The rule concerns immunity from liability for actions related to opioid antagonists in schools. It has no connection to residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraised values under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A person who in good faith takes, or fails to take, any action under this subchapter is immune from civil or criminal liability or disciplinary action resulting from that action or failure to act
_note: Educ. Code §38.227 addresses opioid antagonist immunity in schools; it is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
